vulnerabilities.description: Lack of security middlewares like Helmet and CORS with whitelist configuration.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement Helmet for HTTP headers security and configure CORS with a whitelist of trusted domains.

vulnerabilities.description: Absence of JWT authentication and authorization checks for API endpoints requiring secure access.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate JWT middleware to validate tokens and implement RBAC/ABAC for endpoint security.

vulnerabilities.description: The absence of request rate limiting could make the system susceptible to denial-of-service attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add rate-limiting middleware with environment-configured limits to protect against request floods.
